testCoverage.note: Not applicable: this repository is infrastructure-as-code and does not currently have an application unit-test coverage target.

formatting.name: yq/jq
formatting.scope: YAML/JSON inspection and targeted formatting when needed

commitChecks: safe local validation for changed Kubernetes manifests where practical
no secret decryption/exposure without explicit confirmation
deployGates: explicit user confirmation before commit or push
explicit user confirmation before Flux reconcile or live cluster commands
explicit user confirmation before Talos/bootstrap/destructive commands
call out placeholders, assumed 1Password keys, and operational risks

cicdIntegration.note: Keep existing GitHub Actions/flux-local validation. Do not add Babysitter CI/CD integration unless explicitly requested.
